headline: Williams Companies Starts NESE Build As Valuation Gap Draws Attention
summary: Williams Companies has started construction on its Northeast Supply Enhancement project. The NESE project is designed to expand natural gas capacity serving customers across the US Northeast. The project aims to support energy reliability, affordability, and emissions focused goals in a high demand region. For investors tracking Williams Companies, ticker NYSE:WMB, the NESE launch comes with the stock recently trading at around $71.1. Over the past year, the share price return is 25.6%, and...
